name: Brewmaster
description: Shall we call this off and have a friendly round?

abilities.name: Liquid Courage
abilities.description: Grants self a status resistance buff whenever Brewmaster's max health falls below a certain threshold. The lower Brewmaster's health, the greater the status resistance. Grants the unit-targeted ally max status resistance bonus correspondingly to Brewmaster's level, with a max health as health regeneration bonus. The movement speed component applies fully. Min Bonus Health Threshold: 50%. Max Bonus Health Threshold: 20%. Min Status Resist Bonus: 0%. Max Status Resist Bonus: 10.5%. Max Move Speed Slow: 10%. Max Move Speed Bonus: 30%.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.description: Slams the ground, dealing damage and applies a movement speed slow and attack speed slow within the radius. Effect Radius: 400. Damage: 80/160/240/320. Move Speed Slow: 15%/30%/45%/60%. Attack Speed Slow: 15/30/45/60. Duration: 4 (6). Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Cinder Brew
abilities.description: The debuff applied causes enemy units to move slower, and they are ignited upon taking any spell damage instances. Cast Range: 950. Barrel Collision Radius: 75. Travel Distance: 950. Barrel Debuff Width: 350. Final Explosion Radius: 400. Move Speed Slow: 24%/28%/32%/36%. Cooldown: 19/17/15/13. Mana Cost: 50/60/70/80.

abilities.name: Drunken Brawler
abilities.description: Grants bonus armor and bonus magic resistance. All ability values of this stance is multiplied when he is Brewed-up! Grants bonus attack speed. Additionally, Brewmaster's attacks have a chance to critical strike. Brawler Effects Factor: 1.5 (3). First Buff Duration: 5 (6). Buff Duration Increase: 2 (4). Armor Bonus: 3/5/7/9. Magic Resist Bonus: 8%/12%/16%/20%. Move Speed Bonus: 4%/6%/8%/10%. Cooldown: 0.

abilities.name: Primal Split
abilities.description: Grants certain stat bonuses tailored for the elements. Increases both the current and max level of all Primal Split-based abilities. Split Time: 0.6. Spawn Distance: 100. Duration: 16/18/20/20. Base Attack Damage Bonus: (14). Health Bonus: (600). Cooldown: 140/130/120/120 (125/115/105/105). Mana Cost: 150/200/250/250.
